text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In front of the academy gate...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Curren! If it's okay with you, could we take a
selfie together?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Ding, ding, ding! ♪ I just cooked up a super
cute pose, just for youuu!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan
text_block_list.text:
W-were you thinking of a pose just for me?! Wow!
You're amazing! And sooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll treasure this picture forever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...That was close. I can't let myself slip like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think Curren Chan's a little tired from her
back-to-back races. Maybe I should revise her
schedule.
